entries.summary: Slash command + allowed-tools frontmatter use python3 not python
scenarios: Fresh install on Ubuntu without python alias
acceptance_criteria: grep -n '\bpython\b' on file returns no bare-python matches
On a Linux system without `python` on PATH, the slash command produces the setup-script status table

entries.summary: hooks.json invokes python3 for both review-gate-task and teammate-idle-check
acceptance_criteria: JSON parses cleanly via `python3 -c 'import json; json.load(open(...))'`
On a Linux system without `python` on PATH, hooks return exit 0 or 2 (never command-not-found)

entries.spec_requirement_id: python3-portability/Setup script reports python3 PATH resolution
entries.summary: setup.py adds _python3_on_path() helper + reporting row with OS-specific remediation
acceptance_criteria: Returns (False, remediation_str) when shutil.which('python3') returns None — remediation per sys.platform
main() appends a `python3-on-path` row to the status table after `check_python_version`
Absence is non-fatal (warning, exit code still 0)

entries.summary: ≥5 new tests across test_setup_script.py / test_commands.py / test_hooks_structure.py
acceptance_criteria: Full suite `python -m pytest -v` reports ≥ 74 PASS (69 prior + 5 new)

entries.summary: README lists python3 prerequisite with OS-specific one-liner remediation
acceptance_criteria: Section names python3 explicitly + lists per-OS remediation (Ubuntu, macOS, Windows)
Existing test suite still passes after edit

entries.summary: Version bump + CHANGELOG entry + commit + tag + push
acceptance_criteria: CHANGELOG.md has `## [0.2.4] — 2026-05-16` entry referencing python3-portability REQ-001..REQ-005
Full suite passes one final time from clean state
Annotated tag v0.2.4 exists with explicit author override

reuse_decisions.rationale: Every modified surface (command, hooks, setup script, tests, README, version files) already exists. Zero new modules, zero new files, zero new dependencies. The helper `_python3_on_path()` is a new function within the existing setup.py module — extension at the function level, not the module level.
reuse_decisions.codebase_map_anchor: docs/CODEBASE_MAP.md §3 directory tree + §4 Module Guide rows for commands/, hooks/, scripts/setup/, tests/, README.md

notes.no_frontend: Plugin has zero frontend surface; Playwright user-flow tests do not apply.
notes.no_backend_api: Plugin has zero HTTP API surface; dev-api-integration tests do not apply. Test discipline = pytest unit + structural.
notes.single_team: Per Phase 2 sizing rule, this change is small enough to be implemented by a single Superpowers-driven backend agent (`backend-portability`). No parallel teams; no reconciliation phase needed.
